chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-195 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.999/19. 3. For orders on M.A No.1000/19. 4. For hearing of main case. 16-04-2019. Petitioner in Person. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General. = The instant petition has been filed by the petitioner in person, wherein the petitioner has sought relief in respect of Mubarak Cooperative Credit Society and its properties for which she has prayed for forensic audit of markup of depositors’ amount. It is also prayed that the instant petition be tagged with C.P No.D-1593 of 2012, C.P No.D-110 of 2013 and C.P No.D- 1401 of 2016. It appears that the petitioner has claimed not only Mubarak Cooperative Credit Society but also Aliabad and Hyderabad Cooperative Credit Societies. From the ill-drafted petition, it appears that some fraud has been committed regarding which proceedings before Anti-Corruption Court as well as NAB Authorities were initiated and it also reflects from an advertisement published in daily “Jung” newspaper dated 14.08.2012, that Mubarak Cooperative Credit Society has been liquidated or the same is under liquidation. In the existing position of affairs, when some proceedings have already been initiated either by the petitioner or someone else, and even liquidation of the subject society / societies have been ordered then no fresh petition can be filed regarding the same subject matter. We are of the view that the instant petition is misconceived and is not maintainable, as such, the same is dismissed. Nevertheless, the petitioner may file appropriate application in any other proceedings regarding the aforementioned Cooperative Society / Societies, or for her grievance she may approach to the official liquidator.

We are of the view that the instant petition is misconceived and is not maintainable, as such, the same is dismissed. Nevertheless, the petitioner may file appropriate application in any other proceedings regarding the aforementioned Cooperative Society / Societies, or for her grievance she may approach to the official liquidator. Petition stands dismissed alongwith listed application[s]. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
